lines.speaker: Karam
lines.text: My squad and I are to remain on this island in secret. The monkeys think we are trying to break our friends out of the jail, but we are just biding our time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you still doing here?

lines.speaker: Karam
lines.text: I'm hunting for maniacal monkeys that escaped Glough's airship laboratory!

lines.speaker: Karam
lines.text: Not yet, I'm still perfecting my strategy... I'll let you know as soon as I find a way.
